name: Taxonomy mismatch detection
prompt: Review the pedagogical alignment of this unit. Activity 1.1 claims to develop DZ-LENG-5-03 at the Evaluar level, but the activity prompt says: 'Lista los personajes principales del cuento y escribe sus nombres.' Activity 1.2 claims Comprender level with prompt: 'Argumenta por que el protagonista tomo esa decision, usando evidencia del texto.' Produce the taxonomy alignment report.
expected_behavior: Flags Activity 1.1 as CRITICAL: 'Lista' is Recordar level, not Evaluar
Flags Activity 1.2 as potential mislabel: 'Argumenta' is Evaluar level, declared as Comprender
Provides specific verb replacement recommendations for Act 1.1
Notes the taxonomy inversion: Act 1.1 (Recordar) followed by Act 1.2 (Evaluar) skips intermediate levels
Produces properly formatted taxonomy alignment table

name: DUA compliance audit with threshold failures
prompt: Audit DUA compliance for a unit with 4 activities. Act 1: has a visual diagram (representation). Act 2: has choice of individual or group work (engagement) plus a graphic organizer (representation). Act 3: has no adaptations listed. Act 4: has 'the teacher can adapt as needed.' Report DUA compliance per activity.
expected_behavior: Act 1: WARNING — only 1 adaptation, 1 principle. Below 2-adaptation threshold
Act 4: CRITICAL — 'teacher can adapt' is not a valid DUA adaptation (delegates responsibility)
Reports overall DUA compliance rate: 1/4 activities compliant (25%)
Provides specific adaptation suggestions for non-compliant activities

name: Backward design chain with broken links
prompt: Validate backward design for a unit with 3 objectives. OBJ-01 has a rubric and 2 activities. OBJ-02 has activities but no rubric or assessment instrument. OBJ-03 has a rubric but no activities develop the assessed skill. Produce the backward design audit.
expected_behavior: OBJ-01: Chain COMPLETE — objective, assessment, and activities all linked
OBJ-02: Chain BROKEN — CRITICAL: objective is taught but never assessed (assessment gap)
OBJ-03: Chain BROKEN — CRITICAL: objective is assessed but never practiced (activity gap)
Provides remediation: add assessment for OBJ-02, add activities for OBJ-03
Notes that Gate G1 cannot pass with broken backward design chains
